NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED, ANSWER FILED. NO APPEARANCE REQUIRED. (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

Notice Of Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Default & Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-11-2008 Continued To Mar-14-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JEFFREY MACMULLEN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE DEFAULT & JUDGMENT.
APPEARANCES: ELIZABETH A. MACDONALD, ESQUIRE (415.922.5939) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. JEFFREY MACMULLEN, PRO PER (221.1734) APPEARING ON HIS OWN BEHALF.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED PROVIDED DEFENDANT PROVIDES A FILED ANSWER BY THE CLOSE OF BUSINESS ON MARCH 13, 2008. IF THE ANSWER IS FILED, THE DEFAULT WILL BE LIFTED. IF THE ANSWER IS NOT FILED, DEFAULT WILL NOT BE LIFTED. THE REQUEST FOR FEES IS DENIED. MATTER IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 14, 2008 TO CONFIRM THAT THE ANSWER IS OR IS NOT FILED. NO APPEARANCE NECESSARY. (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: CONTINUED TO MARCH 11, 2008. THE COURT REQUIRES THAT THE OPPOSING PARTY IS TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH A SET OF COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR PAPERS. WHEN SUBMITTING THE DUPLICATE COPIES, PLEASE PROVIDE A COVER LETTER TO THE COURT REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE SO THAT THE COURTESY COPIES WON'T BE MISPLACED WHEN RECEIVED. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
